chunks.text: ORDER SHEET I N T HE HI G H CO U R T O F S I N DH B E N C H AT S U K K U R Cr. Misc. Appln. No. S – 122 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of MA No.1066/2025 (S/A) 28.11.2025 Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, Additional PG for the State >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the applicant. Learned Additional PG submits that in compliance of order dated 25.02.2025 passed by learned Additional Sessions Judge-I / Ex. Officio Justice of Peace, Sukkur, the FIR of Respondent No.3, namely, Nizamuddin Dharejo bearing Crime No. 33 of 2025 has been registered at Police Station, Kandhra, therefore, the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application has become infructuous. In view of the statement of learned Additional PG, the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application is disposed of having become infructuous along with listed application. Judge ARBROHI/PS
